{{Quote|Excuse my intrusion. However, I thought you should all be aware that a Huttian spacecraft has been spied approaching Tatooine, due north of our position. It appears to be the Zorba Express.|[[MD-5]]|<ref name="QOE" />}}
The '''''Zorba Express''''', also known as '''''Zorba's Express''''', was an ancient [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that belonged to [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], shady businessman and [[Parent/Legends|father]] of the famous [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

==Characteristics==
A typical bell-shaped [[Hutt/Legends|Huttian]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]],<ref name="ZtHR" /> the ''Zorba Express'' belonged to a [[Huttian star yacht|class]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]],<ref name="HHH" /> the design of which predated the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Date">In the novel ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'', it was stated that the ''Zorba Express'' was left on [[Kip]] following [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]]'s arrest. It was later precised in the [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48]] that Zorba was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].</ref> When standing upright, the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] resembled a domed building distinguished by several spires. Its boarding hatch was shaped like a diaphragm shutter and could be accessed by a ramp. The cockpit of the ''Zorba Express'' was roomy enough to fit a Hutt, an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]]-sized [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and at least another passenger.<ref name="ZtHR" />

==History==
[[File:ZorbaMugshot-HNN.png|thumb|left|Zorba Desilijic Tiure, owner of the ''Zorba Express'']]
{{Quote|I want every inch of the ''Zorba Express'' searched from its Telgorn flight computers to its rear bulk storage compartments!|[[Bertroff Hissa]]|<ref name="QOE" />}}
During the second [[Standard month/Legends|month]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Zorba was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] on the muddy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kip]] for the illegal removal of [[ulikuo gemstone]]s,<ref name="HNN1">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|regional/13321_5.html|Zorba the Hutt Sentenced to 45 Years}}</ref> and the '''Zorba Express'' was abandoned on a cliff immediately after the Hutt's capture. However, the native [[Kip (species)|inhabitants]] of Kip never figured out how to fly that spaceship. As a consequence, the ''Zorba Express'' was still waiting for its owner, when Zorba was freed by a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. By that [[Time/Legends|time]], the ''Zorba Express'' was very much in disrepair; some observers believed that the vessel would not even be able to break the sound barrier after several more trips if it was not serviced.<ref name="ZtHR" />

Despite that, Zorba still used his personal transport to get to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] planet that had been the fiefdom of his son, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]]. After discovering that Jabba had been [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], Zorba laid claim to much of his son's properties throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He took off in the ''Zorba Express'', bound for the floating metropolis of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], in which Jabba once owned a casino.<ref name="ZtHR" /> He also traveled to [[Hologram Fun World]], an [[amusement park]] that drove customers away from his newly acquired casino. While there, Zorba successfully captured Princess Organa, and he put her in the ''Zorba Express'' so he could bring her back to Tatooine and execute her.<ref name="QOE">''[[Queen of the Empire]]''</ref>

However, Zorba and his yacht were captured in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Tatooine by [[Trioculus]], [[Supreme Slavelord]] of the [[Kessel/Legends|Kesselian]] [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines]] and self-anointed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]]. As Zorba refused to cooperate with Trioculus' plan, the Hutt was fed to the monstrous [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] of Tatooine, and the Supreme Slavelord remained in possession of his battered yacht.<ref name="QOE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]''
